title: New Catholic Journey
description: A guided introduction to the Catholic faith for RCIA candidates and new Catholics. Covers the foundational beliefs and practices that define what it means to be Catholic.

title: Defend the Faith
description: Answers to the most common Protestant challenges to Catholic teaching. Equips you to explain and defend Catholic beliefs clearly and charitably.

title: Marian Apologetics
description: A deep dive into Catholic teachings about the Blessed Virgin Mary — her immaculate conception, perpetual virginity, role as intercessor, and place in the Church.
audience: Catholics seeking to defend Marian doctrine
